data.title: XRP Open Interest Has Surged 36% In Two Weeks – Is Momentum Building?
data.description:
XRP is trading above key support levels after several days of intense volatility driven by macroeconomic concerns and mounting trade war fears. Since March 11, XRP has jumped more than 35%, showing signs of renewed strength as bulls attempt to reclaim higher price levels and ignite a fresh rally. The move comes at a time when broader altcoin sentiment remains fragile, with no clear direction for the market in the weeks ahead. Related Reading: Ethereum Reclaims Realized Price – Bulls Face Strong Resistance At $2,300 Despite the uncertain landscape, XRP’s recent price action has caught the attention of traders and analysts alike
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/ripple/xrp-open-interest-has-surged-36-in-two-weeks-is-momentum-building/

data.title: US government moves all Bitcoin from the Sae-Heng confiscated funds wallet
data.description:

data.title: Solana price struggles to flip $150 to support — Is the SOL bull market over?
data.description:
Solana's native token, SOL (SOL), faced a sharp 8% rejection after briefly touching $147 on March 25. For the past three weeks, SOL has struggled to reclaim the $150 level, which is leading traders to question whether the bullish momentum that was originally driven by memecoin speculation and the rise of artificial intelligence sectors has come to an end. Some analysts argue that SOL price could significantly benefit from the eventual approval of a Solana spot exchange-traded fund (ETF) in the United States, as well as the expansion of tokenized real-world assets (RWA) on the Solana network, including stablecoins and money market funds.  Others, like Nikita Bier, co-founder of TBH and Gas startups, believe Solana has "the fundamental building blocks for something to break out on mobile
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/solana-price-struggles-to-flip-150-to-support-is-the-sol-bull-market-over?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: U.S. Justice Department Seizes $201,000 Earmarked for Hamas
data.description:
Hamas supporters have used several seized wallet addresses to raise roughly $1. 5 million in digital currencies for the militant group since October 2024.
source: https://decrypt.co/312045/u-s-justice-department-seizes-200000-hamas

data.title: Dogecoin Price Eyes $0.50, Whale Clusters Fuel Bullish Momentum
data.description:
Dogecoin (DOGE) price surged 18% over the past week, hitting $0. 1965 on March 26. The memecoin outperformed the broader market and now shows early signs of entering a bullish trend. The breakout followed a rejection of its multi-month descending trendline
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/27/dogecoin-price-eyes-0-50-whale-clusters-fuel-bullish-momentum/

data.title: Sam Bankman-Fried's Transfer Raises Legal Attention
data.description:
Sam Bankman-Fried transferred from Brooklyn to Oklahoma's transit center after unauthorized interview. Release date set for November 17, 2044.
source: https://coincu.com/328976-sam-bankman-fried-transfer-legal
